_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Identify and submit exemplary AI use cases, best practices, failure modes, and risk mitigation strategies, including after-action reports.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in conducting AI impact assessments, including risk tiering, harm identification, bias evaluation, human oversight documentation, and residual risk determination.
comments: DCWF task equal WIDAI AG domain. AG-S-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-007 (AI, cosine: 0.686), RM-T-003 (RM, cosine: 0.665).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.3/10 (raw 0.633). Shared vocabulary: [ai, risk]. DCWF-only terms [action, best, cases, exemplary, failure, identify] vs WIDAI-only terms [assessments, bias, conducting, determination, documentation, evaluation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.878 (P=0.877, R=0.878). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DCWF element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: entailment-dominant (97.8%). The model interprets "Identify and submit exemplary AI use cases, best practices, failure modes, and r" as logically implying aspects of "Skill in conducting AI impact assessments, including risk tiering, harm identifi" — directional semantic containment consistent with 'Equal' classification.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.690 > STS 0.633 (gap +0.058). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ai, risk] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.1%. Shared tokens: [ai, risk]. DCWF-only: [action, best, cases, exemplary, failure, identify]. WIDAI-only: [assessments, bias, conducting, determination, documentation, evaluation].
